title: Basic cursor pagination with a deterministic tie-breaker
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.feed_first_page/1` that takes a `page_size` integer and returns the first page of published posts ordered by `(published_at desc, id desc)`. The `id` secondary sort is the unique tie-breaker. Use `limit: ^page_size`. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Introduces deterministic sort concept but only asks for the ordering clause — no cursor filtering yet.
research_citation: duffelhq/paginator: 'This method requires a deterministic sort order'
